issues.description: Pigeon cage not mapped despite being explicitly mentioned in step text
issues.details: Step says 'Get 5 pigeon cages while you're in Ardy' but no pigeon cage item (ID 424 or 425) is in items[] mapping
issues.impact: Critical - cannot execute step without knowing pigeon cages are required

issues.details: Step text explicitly states '5 pigeon cages', but item is not mapped at all
issues.impact: Player would not know the required quantity

notes: All 12 mapped items verified correct: IDs match items.json, names accurate. Quest IDs valid: WHAT_LIES_BELOW, ONE_SMALL_FAVOUR, SCORPION_CATCHER correctly selected for active progression. Items sourced from itemsNeeded metadata are appropriate - mostly quest and potion requirements. Cash stack abstraction (30k gp) is genuine and appropriate. Gap: pigeon cage (ID 424/425, qty 5) is explicitly required in step text but missing from mapping. This appears to be an extraction/parsing oversight rather than a conceptual mapping error. Confidence reduced due to missing explicit item, but all present items are accurate.
recommendations: Add pigeon cage (ID 424 or 425) with qty: 5 to items[] with source: 'content'
Audit itemsNeeded parsing to ensure 'pigeon cage' wasn't missed
Spot-check other steps for similar explicit-but-unmapped items
